title: InfiniteFuel
description: Makes the Nether Star a reusable fuel source
body:
# InfiniteFuel  
Makes the Nether Star a reusable fuel source that burns for 5 times as long as a lava bucket.
Once depleted, repair the nether star in a Smithing Table with any glass block to reuse.

![Burning a Nether Star in the Furnace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kevinthegreat1/InfiniteFuel/main/assets/showcase1.png "Burning a Nether Star in the Furnace")
![Repairing a depleted Nether Star](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kevinthegreat1/InfiniteFuel/main/assets/showcase2.png "Repairing a depleted Nether Star")

[Inspired by @andrew6rant](https://discord.com/channels/507304429255393322/556200510592647168/1059275679574786168)
